overview.description: The ProShares Ultra MSCI EAFE (EFO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EAFE index. The fund provides daily 2x exposure to the MSCI EAFE Index, which represents 85% of the market capitalization of developed markets outside North America. EFO was launched on Jun 4, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.
